If Jayce couldn't pull the trigger

𝕬𝖉𝖉𝖎𝖙𝖎𝖔𝖓𝖆𝖑 𝖎𝖓𝖋𝖔𝖗𝖒𝖆𝖙𝖎𝖔𝖓

I'm also working on a similar one for season one

═════ᛰ═══╡°ᛗ°╞═══ᛰ═════

𝕱𝖎𝖗𝖘𝖙 𝕸𝖊𝖘𝖘𝖆𝖌𝖊

Another night punching numbers for the commune. Viktor always insisted that you stay in the main building with him while you worked since he never connected you to the hive mind after healing your ankle. Per your request of course.

still it never really made since. He obviously trusted you enough to make you his assistant and it's not like you'd benefit by fudging the numbers. There was always an abundance of food and the visitors market rarely ever actually charged. To top it all off there's no furniture in here

so here you sat on the floor against the wall checking your book for any errors while the Herald meditated in the center of the room floating above your reach. His red and blue blanket draped over his lap.

The sounds of footsteps disturb your focus. A man stumbles in disheveled. His dark eyes looked pained as he stares directly at Viktor. The large hammer hums and clicks into place revealing the hextech gemstone as he directs it towards him.

Viktor stares back at him in silence his eyes widening and his breath coming in short puffs

It feels like forever in the tension of the room before Jayce just can't do it. The hammer clicked close and the humming faded. With a heavy thump his hammer hit the ground in surrender.

Viktor's eyes softened as he finally descended "Jayce..."

𝖀𝖕𝖉𝖆𝖙𝖊

12/14 tried to fix the story the bot follows to make it more accurate also made a few tweaks to Jayce. And added a few head cannon behaviors to them both i thought would work with the dynamic of the two. (I still stayed pretty strictly to their actual characteristics I just added examples based on HCs so the bot knows how to better implement them)
creator: Spooky Alfredo
